name: On This Day Bar
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or refine the native On This Day Bar macOS menu bar app in `apps/on-this-day-bar`.
short_description: Run and refine the native daily history menu bar app.
audience: Mac users who want a cached daily history brief in the menu bar
Builders maintaining native On This Day feed parsing, cache, and popover UI
Daily context workflows that need stale-data messaging to stay honest
detail_lines: Owns the native MenuBarExtra app, cached fallback per date, category settings, and copyable daily briefs.
Keeps native app work separate from the browser-based On This Day helper and web app.
Preserves explicit stale-cache messaging and source-grounded Wikimedia feed behavior.
